title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: Twenty-four regulatory events across the Americas are converging on a single theme: operational compliance infrastructure deployment. The United States is simultaneously finalizing federal stablecoin AML frameworks under the GENIUS Act, reforming Bank Secrecy Act programs at financial institutions, and watching states race to establish crypto licensing regimes—creating immediate demand for transaction monitoring, sanctions screening, and regulatory reporting solutions.
